articles.title: US-China trade talks open in Paris, paving the way for Trump-Xi summit
articles.description:
China’s commerce ministry said Friday the two sides are set to discuss “trade and economic issues of mutual concern.”

The post US-China trade talks open in Paris, paving the way for Trump-Xi summit appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US-China trade talks commenced in Paris, focusing on mutual economic concerns.
Discussions may influence tariffs affecting Boston's import-export businesses.
Potential outcomes could impact local job markets and consumer prices in Boston.

articles.title: Construction finishes on a major offshore wind farm, the first during Trump’s tenure
articles.description:
Offshore construction was completed Friday night on Vineyard Wind with the installation of the final blades, Craig Gilvarg, a spokesperson for the project, said Saturday.

The post Construction finishes on a major offshore wind farm, the first during Trump’s tenure appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Construction on Vineyard Wind offshore wind farm completed on March 15, 2026.
Final blades installed, marking a significant milestone for renewable energy in Massachusetts.
Project expected to boost local jobs and provide clean energy to thousands of Boston residents.

summary: Patriots have addressed multiple positions during the first week of free agency.

articles.title: Neemias Queta dominates in Celtics win over Wizards: 7 takeaways
articles.description:
Queta led Boston with 24 points Saturday.

Queta's performance boosts local excitement for the team's upcoming games.

articles.title: Photos: Highlights from Dropkick Murphys’ St. Patrick’s Day kickoff at MGM Music Hall
articles.description:
See all the greatest moments from the band’s March 13 show, plus openers The Vigilantes, Haywire, and Showcase Showdown.

summary: Dropkick Murphys performed at MGM Music Hall on March 13, celebrating St. Patrick's Day.

The concert attracted Boston residents, boosting local tourism and community engagement.
